title: Revamped Vanilla Multiplayer
description: Also adds world generation, vanilla qol, dungeons.
body: This revamps vanilla multiplayer while it is not tarnishing it. This modpack tries to adhere to original vanilla. It adds new biomes, dungeons, revamped end, and other quality of life features. It is not too hard to run, if not using shaders. You can also download shaders and resource packs straight from the menu!
